reason: Verify Gmail adapter behavior, OAuth security, cursors, MIME, attachments, read, send, and typed errors.
Verify provider-aware claims, invalid-cursor reset boundary, cancellation, and ambiguous-send safety.
Verify credentials remain outside SQLite and reconnect updates are crash-safe.
Verify onboarding accessibility and complete safe UI states.
Verify OAuth URLs/codes/tokens never appear in frontend DTOs or events.
Verify contract tests and owner checklist cover the researched Gmail edge cases.
